full_text:
Hu Hao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Haowas born in Nan. Away in Jiyin when his mother died, persuaded Cai Yong compose a mourning elegy. Hu Hao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
